entry.data:
SUNNY
NEAR STEADY TEMPERATURE IN THE LOWER 70S
SOUTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE LOWER 50S
SOUTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 50S
SOUTHWEST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH, BECOMING NORTHWEST AROUND 5 MPH AFTER MIDNIGHT

SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
NORTH WINDS AROUND 5 MPH, BECOMING WEST AROUND 5 MPH IN THE AFTERNOON

MOSTLY CLEAR
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
LOWS IN THE LOWER 40S

PARTLY CLOUDY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 50S
LOWS IN THE UPPER 30S

MOSTLY CLOUDY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 60S
LOWS IN THE MID 40S

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 70S
